attributes.description: Draws the button with a caret. Used to indicate that the button triggers a dropdown menu or similar behavior.
attributes.name: caret

attributes.description: Draws the button in a loading state.
attributes.name: loading

attributes.description:
The type of button. Note that the default value is `button` instead of `submit`, which is opposite of how native
`<button>` elements behave. When the type is `submit`, the button will submit the surrounding form.
attributes.name: type

attributes.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a name/value pair with form data, but only when this button is the submitter.
This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description:
The value of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's name as part of the form data, but only when this
button is the submitter. This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.
attributes.name: value

attributes.description: When set, the underlying button will be rendered as an `<a>` with this `href` instead of a `<button>`.
attributes.name: href

attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is present.
attributes.name: target

attributes.description:
When using `href`, this attribute will map to the underlying link's `rel` attribute. Unlike regular links, the
default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits. However, if you're using `target` to point to a
specific tab/window, this will prevent that from working correctly. You can remove or change the default value by
setting the attribute to an empty string or a value of your choice, respectively.
attributes.name: rel

attributes.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is present.
attributes.name: download

attributes.description:
The "form owner" to associate the button with. If omitted, the closest containing form will be used instead. The
value of this attribute must be an id of a form in the same document or shadow root as the button.
attributes.name: form

attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `action` attribute.
attributes.name: formaction

attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `enctype` attribute.
attributes.name: formenctype

attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `method` attribute.
attributes.name: formmethod

attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `novalidate` attribute.
attributes.name: formnovalidate

attributes.description: Used to override the form owner's `target` attribute.
attributes.name: formtarget

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

cssParts.description: The button's caret icon, an `<syn-icon>` element.
cssParts.name: caret

cssParts.description: The spinner that shows when the button is in the loading state.
cssParts.name: spinner

events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.
events.name: syn-invalid

methods.description: Simulates a click on the button.
methods.name: click

methods.description: Checks for validity but does not show a validation message. Returns `true` when valid and `false` when invalid.
methods.name: checkValidity

methods.description: Gets the associated form, if one exists.
methods.name: getForm

methods.description: Checks for validity and shows the browser's validation message if the control is invalid.
methods.name: reportValidity

methods.description: Sets a custom validation message. Pass an empty string to restore validity.
methods.name: setCustomValidity

properties.description: The button's theme variant.
properties.name: variant

properties.description: The button's size.
properties.name: size

properties.description: Draws the button with a caret. Used to indicate that the button triggers a dropdown menu or similar behavior.
properties.name: caret

properties.description: Disables the button.
properties.name: disabled

properties.description: Draws the button in a loading state.
properties.name: loading

properties.description:
The type of button. Note that the default value is `button` instead of `submit`, which is opposite of how native
`<button>` elements behave. When the type is `submit`, the button will submit the surrounding form.
properties.name: type

properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a name/value pair with form data, but only when this button is the submitter.
This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.

The value of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's name as part of the form data, but only when this
button is the submitter. This attribute is ignored when `href` is present.

properties.name: href

properties.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is present.
properties.name: target

properties.description:
When using `href`, this attribute will map to the underlying link's `rel` attribute. Unlike regular links, the
default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits. However, if you're using `target` to point to a
specific tab/window, this will prevent that from working correctly. You can remove or change the default value by
setting the attribute to an empty string or a value of your choice, respectively.
properties.name: rel

properties.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is present.
properties.name: download

properties.description:
The "form owner" to associate the button with. If omitted, the closest containing form will be used instead. The
value of this attribute must be an id of a form in the same document or shadow root as the button.
properties.name: form

properties.description: Used to override the form owner's `action` attribute.
properties.name: formAction

properties.description: Used to override the form owner's `enctype` attribute.
properties.name: formEnctype

properties.description: Used to override the form owner's `method` attribute.
properties.name: formMethod

properties.description: Used to override the form owner's `novalidate` attribute.
properties.name: formNoValidate

properties.description: Used to override the form owner's `target` attribute.
properties.name: formTarget

properties.description: Gets the validity state object
properties.name: validity

properties.description: Gets the validation message
properties.name: validationMessage

slots.description: A presentational prefix icon or similar element.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: A presentational suffix icon or similar element.
slots.name: suffix

summary: Buttons represent actions that are available to the user.
